allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); resources=d.get\('resources',[]\); print\(f'{len\(resources\)} resources'\); [print\(r.get\('type'\), r.get\('name'\)\) for r in resources[:20]]")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import griffe; print\(griffe.__version__\); import pydantic_ai; print\(pydantic_ai.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import griffe; print\([x for x in dir\(griffe\) if 'Docstring' in x or 'Section' in x]\)")
